1127.issue: [W1127] [io-package.json](https://github.com/MiRo1310/ioBroker.alexa-shoppinglist/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "list_inactiv_sort" common.states must be number or string

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.1.3 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_options/items/status" attribute "textNotAlive" uses key "You have to start the Adapter before you can configure!" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

6023.issue: [W6023] Sentry plugin is configured in [io-package.json](https://github.com/MiRo1310/ioBroker.alexa-shoppinglist/blob/master/io-package.json) but the required Sentry information was not found in [README.md](https://github.com/MiRo1310/ioBroker.alexa-shoppinglist/blob/master/README.md). Please add the standard Sentry notice near the top of [README.md](https://github.com/MiRo1310/ioBroker.alexa-shoppinglist/blob/master/README.md).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.7.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/MiRo1310/ioBroker.alexa-shoppinglist/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
